about.title: About Memorial
about.subtitle: About this archive
about.deck: Memorial is a multilingual digital archive. It honors the martyrs of the Sudanese Revolution. It keeps their names, stories, and what they left behind, with care and respect.
about.paragraph1: Upheaval disrupts memory first. Stories slip away. Details fade, and lives risk turning into numbers. Memorial pushes back against that loss. It holds a direct belief: every life carries a story worth keeping, and shared memory matters for justice.
about.paragraph2: The platform is searchable and open. It records the human side of the revolution. Verified accounts sit beside personal tributes and context, so each martyr is known not only by death, but by life, beliefs, and community ties.
about.paragraph3: Memorial grows through people. Families, friends, and witnesses can contribute. They share memories, photos, and fragments that might disappear otherwise, slowly building an archive that crosses languages and borders.
about.paragraph4: It is not only about the past. It holds space for connection and reflection, and for something that continues. Memory stays guarded here, stories move forward, and the sacrifices linked to freedom still speak.
about.paragraph5: Memorial is an open archive. Its strength is care, restraint, and the willingness to remember with precision.
about.closingNote: Open archive · Searchable · Built with care

contribute.title: Contribute to the Archive
contribute.subtitle: Help us honor and preserve the memory of the martyrs
contribute.shareInfoText: If you have biographical information, stories, or details about any of the martyrs, please share them with us. Every piece of information helps us create a more complete and accurate historical record.
contribute.submitMediaText: We are collecting photographs and videos that capture the lives and spirits of the martyrs. These visual memories are invaluable in keeping their legacies alive and providing a human connection to their stories.
contribute.shareStoriesText: Personal stories, memories, and testimonials from family members and friends help humanize the archive and remind us of the real people behind each profile. Your memories matter.
contribute.guideline1: Ensure all information is accurate and verified when possible
contribute.guideline2: Photos should be high quality and respectful in nature
contribute.guideline3: Include dates, full names, and context for all submissions
contribute.guideline4: Obtain permission from family members when sharing personal content
contribute.guideline5: Provide biographical information in both English and Arabic when possible
contribute.reviewMessage: We review all submissions carefully and with the utmost respect. Thank you for helping us preserve these important memories.
contribute.noticeText: All submissions become part of the permanent historical archive. By contributing, you help ensure these stories are never forgotten.
contribute.bottomCTA: Your contribution, no matter how small, helps preserve the memory and honor the sacrifice of the martyrs of the Sudanese Revolution.
contribute.togetherMessage: Together, we ensure their sacrifice is never forgotten.
